reviews.review_description: Cannot get past recommend touch free warning. Do I need a different set of controllers?

developer_response.body: No need for another set of controllers, just put the controller down and play with just your hands

reviews.review_description: This game is a captivating VR experience. The hand tracking is intuitive, making interaction with the magical world seamless. The triple space switching adds depth with unique, challenging puzzles. It's a must-play for VR fans seeking adventure and magic.
It's a pretty good puzzle game. The entire game's content is designed around gesture operations. The artwork is nice, and the puzzle designs are all pretty interesting.

developer_response.body: You can look forward to our next game, which will be released around May 1st.

reviews.review_description: The visual effect is very immersive and the gameplay is very novel. The mechanism is not difficult, but it requires thinking. Support!

developer_response.body: thank you for playing our game
